name: font-bigger-prototype
description: Tune matplotlib figure styles from VS Code and rebuild LaTeX PDFs on save.

commands.title: Font Bigger: Run Figure + LaTeX Pipeline
Font Bigger: Create Default Style File

fontBigger.styleFile.description: Relative path to the figure style JSON file.

fontBigger.plotScript.description: Relative path to the Python plotting script.

fontBigger.mainTexFile.description: Relative path to the main TeX file.

fontBigger.pythonCommand.description: Command used to run the Python plotting script.

fontBigger.latexCommand.description: Optional LaTeX build command. When empty, latexmk is used automatically.

fontBigger.runOnSave.description: Run the figure + LaTeX pipeline automatically when the style file is saved.
